title: We need help with resetting our automations
excerpt: Hello, can anyone recommend someone for a straightforward job of resetting our automations?

posts.author: Happytohelp (SARAH)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, can anyone recommend someone for a straightforward job of resetting our automations?

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sarah,
Happy to help. We can take a look at your automations for free and based on the complexity offer an estimate. We are a certified monday partner with tons of experience dealing with automations and integrations.
Please feel free to contact us at info@cinapsys.com

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Happytohelp

At upstream , we are proud to offer our expertise as Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners, and we were most recently awarded Professional Services Partner of the Year!

That said, there are a number of ways we can assist and support you in automation management. Happy to demonstrate for you and help you find best approach for your needs.

Lets discuss further together or have a quick call to get a feel for things if that’s your preference - reach me anytime:

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Happytohelp

Welcome to the monday .com community!

Now, it’s easier to reset automation workflows without spending time on manual work! By using “Rules Builder”, you can easily add, customize, and reset the condition of automation workflows. Similarly, you can create custom triggers and conditions in minutes with this intuitive builder. Thereby, ensuring everyone in your network follows the right stages, and processes function as you built them. Building retuned, error-proof workflows minimizes the chances of inaccuracies and enables you to scale whenever needed.

If you’re looking to reset a range of automation, hire monday.com consultants from a recognized company. They use the builder tool to remove or comment out the unwanted actions and re-launch workflows effectively.
